productDisplayName: Wrangler Men Blue Aaron Check Shirt
description: Composition Blue and white checked shirt made of 100% cotton, has a spread collar with a full front buttoned placket, long sleeves with mid arm button tabs, yoked back, one pocket on left chest, stitch detailing and branding on the pocket and a curved hem Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash inside out with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach or wring Flat dry in shade or tumble dry Warm iron; do not iron on decorations wrangler has been clothing the world since 1947 and they're showing no sign of slowing down – this stylish shirt with its spread collar is a testimony to their eye for fashion. The soft cotton fabric will keep you fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with jeans and leather shoes for that perfect semi-formal look. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
